legal.title: Privacy and Data Usage Policy
legal.p1: We prioritize the security of your information. By registering and using our platform to access entertainment services and manage your purchases, you agree to the following terms:
legal.li1: Data Collection: We store your basic profile information (name, email, and photo) to safely identify you at the venue's entrance or cloakroom.
legal.li2: Secure Purchases: When purchasing drinks, we generate encrypted tokens. We only share your name and the token receipt with the venue to validate your purchase.
legal.li3: Analytical Use: We strictly do not sell your personal data. Geolocation (if enabled) is used exclusively to recommend the best nearby parties.
